title: Machine Learning Engineer Roadmap
description: A path to becoming a Machine Learning Engineer, covering mathematics, programming, ML algorithms, and MLOps.

stages.title: Mathematical Foundations
stages.description: Grasp the core math concepts that underpin machine learning.

modules.title: Probability & Statistics
modules.description: Distributions, hypothesis testing, and bayesian inference.

stages.title: Programming for ML
stages.description: Learn the tools to implement ML models.

modules.title: Python
modules.description: Become proficient in Python, the lingua franca of ML.

modules.title: NumPy & Pandas
modules.description: Master libraries for numerical computation and data manipulation.

stages.title: Core Machine Learning
stages.description: Understand the theory and practice of classical ML algorithms.

modules.title: Scikit-Learn
modules.description: The essential library for implementing classical ML models.

stages.title: Deep Learning
stages.description: Dive into neural networks and modern architectures.

modules.title: Neural Networks
modules.description: Learn about perceptrons, backpropagation, and activation functions.

modules.title: CNNs & RNNs
modules.description: Explore architectures for computer vision and sequential data.

stages.title: MLOps
stages.description: Learn to deploy, monitor, and maintain ML models in production.

modules.title: Model Deployment
modules.description: Serve models via REST APIs (e.g., with FastAPI).

modules.title: Cloud ML Platforms
modules.description: Learn about AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, or Azure ML.
